home.h1: Gustavsburg Cem Evi — modern, multilingual, organized.
home.p: This website is V1: 3 languages, animations, calendar events, team page, public forms + admin area with roles and audit log.

card2.p: Editor/Admin can manage content — everything is logged.

card3.p: Forms & content can be stored in a structured way.

calendar.p: All events are displayed here. Changes are managed via the admin area.

gallery.p: Galleries can be active or archived. Content and sorting are managed by the admin.
gallery.hintAdmin: Item upload & sorting will be added in V2 (Storage + Drag & Drop).

people.p: People with preview image, roles and description.

forms.p: Fill out online and store directly (Supabase).

member.p: Data is stored and can later be filtered/printed.

funeral.p: Securely store wishes and edit them later.

forms.hint: Note: Admin can review, filter and print entries later.

admin.loginHint: Admin/Editor accounts are created in Supabase Auth.
admin.rolesHint: Viewer: read • Editor: create/edit • Admin: delete + audit logs
admin.title: Title
admin.name: Name
admin.formsHint: Here you can see all submitted forms (archive).
admin.auditHint: Audit log shows who changed/deleted what and when.
admin.galleryItemsNote: V1 shows galleries. V2 will add upload/sorting per gallery item.
